title: Derive Meshtastic gateway queue capacity regression from Kconfig
description: Follow-up from project-LICHEN-t2hn.6.4 reviews: meshtastic_adapter tests verify the gateway default queue fits heartbeat + full sync + default NodeDB peers, but the gateway queue depth constants and static-sync record count are duplicated in the test. Make this drift-proof by deriving the queue settings from Kconfig/build metadata or adding compile-time assertions/shared test-visible constants.
